steps.title: Track winter dominance
steps.content: The sentence needs an example of species for which more fish were collected in winter than in spring or autumn. The graph shows that common silver-biddy and milkfish both have winter counts higher than their counts in either other season.

steps.title: Reject wrong comparisons
steps.content: B compares species with each other instead of comparing seasons, C focuses on spring rather than winter, and D focuses on autumn. The needed example must show winter counts exceeding both nonwinter counts for the named species. The answer is A.
